title: ARK's NTM Additions
description: Adds a couple useful stuff such as the Fusion Chamber for the New Tardis Mod
body:
Adds a couple useful stuff such as the Fusion Chamber for the New Tardis Mod

**Recipes:**

![Fusion Chamber](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3adcde31d3783d373bbfc21ac80f07865fd93d5.png)

![Cinnabar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c47652d706d2d5604f07f56eb1e8027adbbcc1f7.png)

![Xion Crystals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f8ab24a77d61fe7868f0d8405e4aa068288d609.png)

![Exotronic Circuits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61859594b807626dc04ada25380f1792ab37d091.png)

**Ores**

**Sulfur Ore** can be found in y levels 5-45 upto 8 ores in one vein

![Sulfur Ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea01d00e9673566ac4ceaac14835171caf458b2e.png)

**Artronium** is a rare ore that can be found in y levels 0-20

![Artronium Ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5509af5c1b73338f5870b8c9d198b2113581214a.png)

It drops an item called **Artronium Dust**, it's used as a really good fuel source for furnaces and etc.

It can smelt 53 items per one Artronium Dust.

Requires: [New Tardis Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/new-tardis-mod)
